'''鈭歸-sh-m''' ('''kawasham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imperialize|imperialize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imperialize|imperialize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-sh-m
|-
! Lemma
| kawasham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwasham|thiwasham]] || [[word:jiwasham|jiwasham]] || [[word:shiwasham|shiwasham]] || [[word:kiwasham|kiwasham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwasham|thuthuwasham]] || [[word:jujuwasham|jujuwasham]] || [[word:shushuwasham|shushuwasham]] || [[word:kukuwasham|kukuwasham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwasham|thuwasham]] || [[word:juwasham|juwasham]] || [[word:shuwasham|shuwasham]] || [[word:kuwasham|kuwasham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwasham|thuwasham]] || [[word:juwasham|juwasham]] || [[word:shuwasham|shuwasham]] || [[word:kuwasham|kuwasham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewasham|thewasham]] || [[word:jewasham|jewasham]] || [[word:shewasham|shewasham]] || [[word:kewasham|kewasham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowasham|thothowasham]] || [[word:jojowasham|jojowasham]] || [[word:shoshowasham|shoshowasham]] || [[word:kokowasham|kokowasham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowasham|thowasham]] || [[word:jowasham|jowasham]] || [[word:showasham|showasham]] || [[word:kowasham|kowasham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowasham|thowasham]] || [[word:jowasham|jowasham]] || [[word:showasham|showasham]] || [[word:kowasham|kowasham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙washam|th忙washam]] || [[word:j忙washam|j忙washam]] || [[word:sh忙washam|sh忙washam]] || [[word:k忙washam|k忙washam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawasham|thathawasham]] || [[word:jajawasham|jajawasham]] || [[word:shashawasham|shashawasham]] || [[word:kakawasham|kakawasham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawasham|thawasham]] || [[word:jawasham|jawasham]] || [[word:shawasham|shawasham]] || [[word:kawasham|kawasham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawasham|thawasham]] || [[word:jawasham|jawasham]] || [[word:shawasham|shawasham]] || [[word:kawasham|kawasham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawasham|shawasham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawasham|goshawasham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawasham|gokishawasham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawashamn眉|shawashamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawashamnkn眉|goshawashamnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawashamn眉|gokishawashamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawashamsh毛|shawashamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawashamnksh毛|goshawashamnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawashamsh毛|gokishawashamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawashamro|shawashamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawashamnkro|goshawashamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawashamro|gokishawashamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawashamu|shawashamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawashamnkmu|goshawashamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawashamu|gokishawashamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawashamsher|shawashamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawashamnksher|goshawashamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawashamsher|gokishawashamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawashamng|shawashamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawashamnkng|goshawashamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawashamng|gokishawashamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawashamya|shawashamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawashamnkya|goshawashamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawashamya|gokishawashamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawashamyam|shawashamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawashamnkyam|goshawashamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawashamyam|gokishawashamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawashamn眉sh毛|shawashamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawashamnkn眉sh毛|goshawashamnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawashamn眉sh毛|gokishawashamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawashamn眉ro|shawashamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawashamnkn眉ro|goshawashamnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawashamn眉ro|gokishawashamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawashamn眉mu|shawashamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawashamnkn眉mu|goshawashamnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawashamn眉mu|gokishawashamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawashamsh毛n眉|shawashamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawashamnksh毛n眉|goshawashamnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawashamsh毛n眉|gokishawashamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawashamsh毛ro|shawashamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawashamnksh毛ro|goshawashamnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawashamsh毛ro|gokishawashamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawashamsh毛mu|shawashamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawashamnksh毛mu|goshawashamnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawashamsh毛mu|gokishawashamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawashamron眉|shawashamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawashamnkron眉|goshawashamnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawashamron眉|gokishawashamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawashamrosh毛|shawashamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawashamnkrosh毛|goshawashamnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawashamrosh毛|gokishawashamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawashamromu|shawashamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawashamnkromu|goshawashamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawashamromu|gokishawashamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawashamun眉|shawashamun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawashamnkmun眉|goshawashamnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawashamun眉|gokishawashamun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawashamush毛|shawashamush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawashamnkmush毛|goshawashamnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawashamush毛|gokishawashamush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawashamuro|shawashamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawashamnkmuro|goshawashamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawashamuro|gokishawashamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|59e8839}}
